"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Summary

The Zipkin exporter remote endpoint cache accepted unbounded key growth derived from span attributes. In high-cardinality scenarios, this could increase process memory usage over time and degrade availability.

### Details

- Introduce a bounded, thread-safe LRU cache for remote endpoints.
- Enforce fixed maximum size to prevent unbounded growth.

### Impact

- A process using Zipkin export for client/producer spans could experience avoidable memory growth under sustained unique remote endpoint values.

### Resources

[#7081](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet/pull/7081)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00311, "percentile": 0.22612}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-28T23:23:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41310"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T22:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T23:23:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet/security/advisories/GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m", "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet/pull/7081", "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet/commit/c724f4bd6fd88e9a599af1668bf7af9487155b62", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41310", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet/security-advisories/GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet", "summary": "OpenTelemetry's Zipkin remote endpoint cache could grow without bounds and increase memory pressure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T19:32:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-88hf-wf7h-7w4m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.15.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Zipkin"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.15.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenTelemetry's Zipkin remote endpoint cache could grow without bounds and increase memory pressure
